name: Device Process Tree
description: Recent process execution activity for the selected device.

parameters.name: DeviceId
parameters.description: Defender device identifier for the selected device

kql: DeviceProcessEvents | where DeviceId == '{{DeviceId}}' | where Timestamp > ago({{LookbackHours}}h) | project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine, FileName, SHA1
